resources.name: Laravel Multilingual Articles
resources.description: API collection for the Laravel Multilingual Articles project

resources.name: List Articles
resources.description:
Returns a paginated, filtered list of article translations.
Public (no API key): only articles with visibility=public.
With API key: all articles including private.

Query params:
- title (string, max:70)
- node_type (article|user_agreement)
- status (draft|published|unpublished)
- language_code (2-char, e.g. 'en')
- updated_at_from (Y-m-d)
- updated_at_to (Y-m-d)
- page (integer, min:1)
- per_page (integer, min:1, max:100)

resources.name: List Articles (with API key - private access)
resources.description: Same as List Articles but sends X-API-KEY header to access private articles too.

resources.name: Get Article by ID
resources.description:
Retrieve a single article with all its translations by article ID.
Visibility is enforced at service level based on API key presence.

resources.name: Get Article by ID (with API key - private access)
resources.description: Retrieve a single article (including private visibility) by providing the X-API-KEY header.

resources.name: Get Article by Path
resources.description:
Retrieve a single article translation by its URL path.
Replace 'welcome-to-our-blog' with the actual path value.
Supports nested paths, e.g. 'section/my-article'.

resources.name: Get Article by Path (with API key - private access)
resources.description: Retrieve a single article translation (including private visibility) by path with API key.

resources.name: Create Article
resources.description:
Creates a new article with its initial translation.
Requires X-API-KEY header.

Required fields:
- node_type: article|user_agreement
- visibility: public|private
- language_code: 2-char code (must exist in site_languages)
- title: string, max:70
- path: string, max:70 (unique per language)
- content: string
- status: draft|published|unpublished

Optional fields:
- summary: string, max:180
- keywords: string, max:255

body.text:
{ "node_type": "article", "visibility": "public", "language_code": "en", "title": "My First Article", "path": "my-first-article", "content": "

This is the full content of the article.

", "status": "published", "summary": "A short summary of the article.", "keywords": "laravel, multilingual, api" }

resources.name: Update Article
resources.description:
Updates an existing article and/or its translation.
Requires X-API-KEY header.
All fields are optional (partial update supported).

Available fields:
- node_type: article|user_agreement
- visibility: public|private
- language_code: 2-char code (must exist in site_languages)
- title: string, max:70
- path: string, max:70 (unique per language, ignores current record)
- content: string
- status: draft|published|unpublished
- summary: string, max:180
- keywords: string, max:255
